concepts.title: LangGraph (graph-based, stateful agents)
concepts.hook: Define agents as graphs; checkpointing and observability; enterprise standard.

concepts.title: CrewAI (role-based crews)
concepts.hook: Simple DSL; 20 lines to start; lower learning curve.

concepts.title: OpenAI Agents SDK (handoff pattern)
concepts.hook: Explicit agent-to-agent handoffs; model-locked to OpenAI.

concepts.title: Anthropic Agent SDK
concepts.hook: Deep Claude integration; safety-focused; lighter on orchestration than LangGraph.

concepts.title: Function calling / tool use patterns
concepts.hook: Model calls tools; execute and feed back results.

concepts.title: Tool definition and validation
concepts.hook: JSON schema; parameter validation; error handling.

concepts.title: Parallel tool execution
concepts.hook: Call multiple tools in one turn; efficiency.

concepts.title: Tool composition and chaining
concepts.hook: Use output of one tool as input to another.

concepts.title: ReAct (Reasoning + Acting)
concepts.hook: Think, then act; observe results; loop.

concepts.title: Hierarchical agents and delegation
concepts.hook: Agents managing sub-agents; delegation for complex tasks.

concepts.title: Agent evaluation and reliability
concepts.hook: Metrics for agent success; tradeoff: cost vs quality.

concepts.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
concepts.hook: Standardize agent-tool communication; Anthropic contributes to Linux Foundation.

concepts.title: Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A)
concepts.hook: Enable agents to discover and communicate with other agents.
